violations.text: Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the hot foods area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: counter near the Hyper Freeze machine creamer area freezer drawers. The non-food contact surfaces of the Dippin Dots chest freezer has an accumulation of frost. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025
The fan covers in walk in 1 has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026

The outside area around the rodent box has an accumulation of litter and leaf litter. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025

Tongs were stored on an unclean surface (side of hot hold unit) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
Freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. 1. Refrigeration gaskets 2. Refrigeration shelving 3. Coffee area shelving New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

The floors in the walk-in freezer have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

The coving in the mop sink area is in poor repair, observed torn. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The floor junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024
